role_summary: a statutory auditor examines financia l statements to provide an independent opinion on their  accuracy and legal compliance.
responsibilities: • conduct statutory audits under applicable laws   • verify financial records and supporting documents   • assess compliance with accounting standards and re gulations   • identify misstatements and control weaknesses   • prepare audit reports and certifications   • communicate audit findings to stakeholders
qualifications: • qualified ca   • in-depth auditing and accounting knowledge   • strong professional judgment   • ethica l and independent mindset
